target.title: fix(local-container): mount bootstrap directory instead of single file
target.body:
## Summary

- Mount the bootstrap script's **parent temp directory** instead of the script file itself, fixing `docker cp` failures on Windows Docker Desktop WSL2
- Defer bootstrap directory cleanup to container release/cleanup instead of immediately after `docker run -d` returns
- Validate `bootstrap_dir` label before deletion (same trust-boundary pattern as `host_work_root`)
- Clean up bootstrap directory on all error paths including post-`createContainer` acquire failures

## Motivation

PR #204 introduced a single-file bind mount of the bootstrap script to work around the Windows 32K CreateProcessW limit. This caused three issues:

1. **`docker cp` broken on WSL2** (P1): Docker Desktop's WSL2 backend fails when `docker cp` resolves container mounts containing a single-file bind mount -- it tries `mkdir` on the file path and gets `EEXIST`
2. **Temp file deleted while container running** (P2): `defer os.Remove()` fires after `docker run -d` returns, deleting the host file before the container finishes reading it
3. **Bootstrap not captured by `docker commit`** (P3, benign): bind-mounted files are excluded from commit snapshots by Docker semantics -- harmless since bootstrap has already exec'd sshd by commit time

## Changes

- `os.CreateTemp` -> `os.MkdirTemp` (directory mount avoids WSL2 path resolution bug)
- Bootstrap script written as `bootstrap.sh` inside the temp directory
- `bootstrap_dir` label stored on the container for cleanup tracking
- `trustedBootstrapDir()` validates label path is absolute, inside system temp dir, and matches `crabbox-bootstrap-*` prefix before `RemoveAll`
- `ReleaseLease` and `Cleanup` both remove the bootstrap directory (with validation) alongside host work root
- `Acquire` error paths clean up bootstrap dir via `cleanupContainer` closure that inspects the container for the label before removal
- Error paths in `createContainer` clean up the temp directory on failure

## Test plan

- [x] Existing localcontainer tests pass (0.36s, Mac M4 Pro)
- [x] `TestTrustedBootstrapDir` covers: valid path, relative path, wrong prefix, traversal, wrong parent directory
- [x] Full crabbox build passes (`go build ./...`)
- [x] ClawSweeper local-review completed
- [ ] Manual: `docker cp` into container on Windows Docker Desktop WSL2 no longer fails
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia
